{{CargoRelic
|name=Glory of the Sun King
|class_id=20762
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=A crown forged from the king's soul, glowing with emberlight hot enough to char undead hands. Every knight refuses this honor - because screw kindling duty.
|fame=14
|art=19
|fth=27
|civ=12
|tech=18
|ss1=Snail DEF +10<br>Per 6 kinds of Souls offered, Snail ATK +1<br>Souls offered: 300/300 types
|ss2=Snail DEF +20<br>Per 6 kinds of Souls offered, Snail ATK +4<br>Souls offered: 300/300 types
|ss3=Snail DEF +30<br>Per 6 kinds of Souls offered, Snail ATK +7<br>Souls offered: 300/300 types
|ss4=Snail DEF +30<br>Per 6 kinds of Souls offered, Snail ATK +7<br>Souls offered: 300/300 types
|ss7=Snail DEF +30<br>Per 6 kinds of Souls offered, Snail ATK +7<br>Souls offered: 300/300 types<br> (Awakened)
}}
